ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity (e.g., crude_oil, biomass) */,
  "commodity_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of commodity */,
  "heat_rate" REAL /* Heat rate of the commodity */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kg CO2/GJ) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the commodity is sourced */,
  "production_year" INTEGER /* Year of production */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the commodity (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "sustainability_rating" INTEGER /* Sustainability rating on a scale (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodities_commodity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_type_id") REFERENCES commodity_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity type (e.g., Energy, Fossil Fuels) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commodity type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent type for hierarchical categorization */,
  "is_retired" INTEGER /* Indicates if the type is retired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES commodity_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission factor record */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "emission_factor_co2" REAL /* Emission factor for CO2 (in kg CO2/GJ) */,
  "emission_factor_ch4" REAL /* Emission factor for CH4 (in kg CH4/GJ) */,
  "emission_factor_n2o" REAL /* Emission factor for N2O (in kg N2O/GJ) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  "emission_factor_ch4_gwp20" REAL /* Emission factor for CH4 using GWP20 */,
  "emission_factor_n2o_gwp20" REAL /* Emission factor for N2O using GWP20 */,
  "emission_factor_co2e_gwp100" REAL /* Combined CO2e emission factor using GWP100 */,
  "emission_factor_co2e_gwp20" REAL /* Combined CO2e emission factor using GWP20 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_factors_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference document or link */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality of the data (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, private, research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_metadata_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_versions_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, environmental analyst, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the commodity */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the commodity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., emissions, usage) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_reports_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, sale) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the commodity involved */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "transaction_price" REAL /* Price of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_transactions_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., trend, comparison) */,
  "analysis_data" TEXT /* Data and insights from the analysis (in JSON format) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "analysis_methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_analysis_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)
